'''hangupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mhw|mhw]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ng-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mhw|mhw]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hangupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hængipith|hængipith]] || [[word:hængipij|hængipij]] || [[word:hængipish|hængipish]] || [[word:hængipi|hængipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hangunguputh|hangunguputh]] || [[word:hangungupuj|hangungupuj]] || [[word:hangungupush|hangungupush]] || [[word:hangungupu|hangungupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hanguputh|hanguputh]] || [[word:hangupuj|hangupuj]] || [[word:hangupush|hangupush]] || [[word:hangupu|hangupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hangufputh|hangufputh]] || [[word:hangufpuj|hangufpuj]] || [[word:hangufpush|hangufpush]] || [[word:hangufpuf|hangufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hanguputhu|hanguputhu]] || [[word:hangupuju|hangupuju]] || [[word:hangupushu|hangupushu]] || [[word:hangupuku|hangupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hanguputh|hanguputh]] || [[word:hangupuj|hangupuj]] || [[word:hangupush|hangupush]] || [[word:hangupu|hangupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hanguputhul|hanguputhul]] || [[word:hangupujul|hangupujul]] || [[word:hangupushul|hangupushul]] || [[word:hangupukul|hangupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hanguputhuthu|hanguputhuthu]] || [[word:hangupujuju|hangupujuju]] || [[word:hangupushushu|hangupushushu]] || [[word:hangupuku|hangupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hanguputhun|hanguputhun]] || [[word:hangupujun|hangupujun]] || [[word:hangupushun|hangupushun]] || [[word:hangupukun|hangupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hanguputhuoro|hanguputhuoro]] || [[word:hangupujuoro|hangupujuoro]] || [[word:hangupushuoro|hangupushuoro]] || [[word:hangupukuoro|hangupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
